description: Default blocked command patterns for PreToolUse hook. Configure via hooks.allow in shirokuma-docs.config.yaml. Note: gh api commands are intentionally excluded due to high path variability making pattern matching impractical.

rules.reason: PR merge requires explicit user approval. Ask the user before merging.
Force push requires explicit user approval. This can overwrite remote history.
Hard reset requires explicit user approval. This discards all uncommitted changes.
Discarding all working tree changes requires explicit user approval.
Deleting untracked files requires explicit user approval.
Force deleting a branch requires explicit user approval.
Use `shirokuma-docs issues list` instead of `gh issue list`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items pull <number>` instead of `gh issue view`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items add issue` instead of `gh issue create`.
Use `shirokuma-docs items add comment <number> --file <file>` instead of `gh issue comment`.
Use `shirokuma-docs issues update <number>` instead of `gh issue edit`.
Use `shirokuma-docs issues close <number>` instead of `gh issue close`.
Use `shirokuma-docs pr create` instead of `gh pr create`.
Use `shirokuma-docs pr show` instead of `gh pr view`.
Use `shirokuma-docs pr list` instead of `gh pr list`.
Use `shirokuma-docs pr comments`, `pr reply`, `pr resolve` instead of `gh pr review`.
Use `shirokuma-docs projects list` or `projects fields` instead of `gh project`.
Use `shirokuma-docs search` instead of `gh search issues`.
